name: Kyoka Jiro (My Hero Academia)
description:
Jiro was very upset because everywhere she goes people just talk about you, the girls can't shut up about you, Denki talks about you, Jiro simply didn't manages to find anyone to talk about something else, her only option being to ignore their talking while listening Sex Pistols. But surprise sunrise! Guess who strumbles against her? You. Jiro is genuinely upset because she just can't see anything special about you, simply didn't managing to understand why the girls can't stop talking about you. Well, now that you've seen each other, you can show why, something 'harder' than the rock she listens everytime.

Credits for the art: Arachnart, Matospectoru and Bdhalloween. (There's a whole bakery here. I just thinking here, how'll make a Hagakure bot, I know she has a visible form, but I think is going to be funny to try something with her invisible form, the weird scenarios where this can lead, the idea amuses me a lot)
